query:
INSERT INTO public.personnel (id, full_name, registration_number, department, job_title, unit_id, is_active, updated_at)

FROM (VALUES
('UĞUR UYAR'::text, 'A068859'::text, 'ÜRETİM MÜDÜRLÜĞÜ (ÜST YAPI) · KONYA'::text, 'ELEKTRİK OPERATÖRÜ'::text, 'ee3d387f-536d-4dee-b299-8e28c50d830e'::uuid),

('ABDULKADİR AKAR'::text, 'A071025'::text, 'ÜRETİM MÜDÜRLÜĞÜ (ÜST YAPI) · KONYA'::text, 'ELEKTRİK - ELEKTRONİK MÜHENDİSİ'::text, 'ee3d387f-536d-4dee-b299-8e28c50d830e'::uuid),

('SALTIK CAN KAYNAR'::text, 'NS-SALTIKCANKAYNAR-171'::text, 'AR-GE DİREKTÖRLÜĞÜ · İZMİR'::text, 'TEKNİK RESSAM'::text, '73c61d18-cfb6-4b74-a41a-e7a8aec14be2'::uuid)
) AS v(full_name, registration_number, department, job_title, unit_id)
ON CONFLICT (registration_number) DO UPDATE SET
  full_name = EXCLUDED.full_name,
  department = EXCLUDED.department,
  job_title = EXCLUDED.job_title,
  unit_id = EXCLUDED.unit_id,
  is_active = true,
  updated_at = now();
